news.summary: In an important development highlighting increased academic collaboration between India and the United States, the City University of New York (CUNY) has introduced a specialized research platform known as the Achyuta Samanta India Initiative of the CUNY CREST Institute (ASIICCI). This initiative, named after Dr. Achyuta Samanta, a respected Indian educator and altruist, is concentrated on academic research within the social and educational sectors of India. This collaboration aims to enhance research efforts in these areas and strengthen ties between academic institutions in the two countries.
news.headline: Dr. Achyuta Samanta gets research institute at CUNY, USA for Indian academia; Named ASIICCI.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, in Stockholm, the Board of Truecaller made a decision to use the authority granted by the Annual General Meeting held on May 23, 2025, to repurchase B-shares. The buyback scheme aims to provide the board of directors with flexibility in adjusting the company's portfolio. Reaffirming its commitment to enhancing shareholder value, Truecaller will repurchase a significant number of B-shares pursuant to the resolution adopted at the Annual General Meeting.
news.headline: Truecaller's board to resume B-share buybacks after AGM approval on May 23, 2025, for continuous adaptation.

news.summary: In March, the United States saw a notable increase in individuals holding multiple full- or part-time jobs, surpassing 8.9 million for the first time since 1994.
news.headline: Over 8.9 million Americans now engage in 'polyworking', holding multiple jobs simultaneously - a 25-year high.

news.summary: The Trump administration has increased Palantir's involvement with the government, extending the company's technology across various agencies. This move could potentially combine data on American citizens.
news.headline: Trump expands Palantir's role in gov't, allowing integration of American data across agencies.

news.summary: In the latest report, it has been revealed that the unemployment rate has dropped to a record low of 3.8%, with the economy adding 250,000 new jobs last month. This decrease marks the lowest level of unemployment in over a decade. Additionally, the stock market saw a significant increase, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising by 500 points. Experts attribute this positive trend to various factors, including strong consumer spending and growth in key industries such as technology and healthcare. Overall, these indicators point to a robust and thriving economy, providing optimism for the future.
news.headline: Judge faces challenge in Google search case due to data issue, with numbers playing a crucial role.

news.summary: According to recent reports, the productivity of workers in the manufacturing sector has increased by an impressive 15% in the past year. This growth has been attributed to the implementation of new technologies and training programs. Additionally, the sector has seen a significant decrease in workplace accidents, with a reduction of 25% compared to the previous year. This positive trend has also led to a rise in profits, with a reported 12% increase in revenue for manufacturing companies. Experts predict that this trend is likely to continue in the coming months, indicating a strong and thriving manufacturing industry.
news.headline: Tips for snagging a bargain this summer: Take advantage of a lower dollar and decreasing airfares.

news.summary: The newspaper has recently made its first licensing deal focused on AI technology. This agreement involves allowing its content to be utilized on Alexa and Amazon's AI training models.
news.headline: AI licensing deal: New York Times partners with Amazon, using content for Alexa and AI training.

news.summary: In the Middle East from January to April 2025, JETOUR, a Chinese auto brand, has achieved the top spot among its counterparts, selling more than 20,000 units. The markets contributing to this success include Saudi Arabia, the UAE, Iraq, Qatar, and Kuwait. This significant milestone is a testament to the brand's growing presence and popularity in the region.
news.headline: JETOUR tops sales for Chinese brands in Middle East Jan-Apr 2025; 20,000 units sold in key markets.

news.summary: In Shenzhen, China, on May 30, 2025, Aurora Mobile Limited (NASDAQ: JG) disclosed the incorporation of the recently updated DeepSeek-R1-0528 AI model into their notable enterprise AI platform, GPTBots.ai. This open-source model, released by DeepSeek, competes with major proprietary models such as OpenAI’s o3 and Google’s Gemini 2.5 Pro, offering enhanced reasoning abilities and developer-friendly characteristics. The integration of DeepSeek-R1-0528 into GPTBots.ai enhances the platform's capability to provide advanced AI solutions to global businesses, solidifying its position in the market.
news.headline: Aurora Mobile integrates DeepSeek-R1-0528 AI model into GPTBots.ai platform for enterprise solutions.

news.summary: Today, the cryptocurrency market has experienced a decline as a result of concerns surrounding the stagnant US-China trade negotiations. This downturn is also attributed to a high number of long liquidations and a vulnerable technical framework.
news.headline: Cryptocurrency market falls today on fears of stalled US-China trade talks, long liquidations, and weak technicals. #crypto #marketdown

news.headline: OpenSea launches OS2 platform, attracting 40% more weekly unique collectors since January - Adam Hollander.

news.summary: In Los Angeles, Faraday Future Intelligent Electric Inc. disclosed that it has entered into a new binding FX business-to-business (B2B) deposit deal with New PBB Auto Inc. The agreement involves a non-refundable deposit along with a non-binding pre-order for 600 units of the upcoming FX model, the Super One MPV. Faraday Future, listed as FFAI on NASDAQ, is a California-based global company specializing in shared intelligent electric mobility solutions.
news.headline: Faraday Future secures deposit for 600 FX Super One MPV from New PBB Auto; exploring FX Par partnership in LA area.

news.summary: On May 30, 2025, Markel, the insurance division of Markel Group Inc. (NYSE: MKL), revealed that Neil Galjaard is resigning as Managing Director of Markel UK. Galjaard assumed this position in 2016 and during his tenure, the revenue of Markel UK experienced significant growth.
news.headline: Neil Galjaard steps down as Managing Director of Markel UK. Lee Mooney appointed in transition. #Markel #Insurance #Leadership
